name: Alchemy
description: Alchemy's hosted MCP server for blockchain APIs and onchain data.
longDescription: Alchemy blockchain MCP server with 168 tools across 100+ blockchains. Query token prices, NFT metadata, transaction history, smart contract simulation, ENS resolution, account abstraction, and Solana DAS.
author: com.alchemy
examplePrompts: What's the current price of ETH?
Show me NFTs owned by this address
Get transaction history for this wallet on Ethereum
